generated_oml:
// Sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring input current I_M from the MABI MAX 100 first rotary axis motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPrimarySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary encoder mounted on the motor shaft of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPrimaryDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSecondarySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted on the gearbox output of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderSecondaryDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Angular position sensor providing the output angle of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Simulation source producing the motor torque output for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedMotorTorqueDataTransmitted
]

// Data transmitted (over MQTT or simulation output)
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPrimaryDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderPrimarySensor
]

instance MotorEncoderSecondaryDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSecondarySensor
]

instance AngularPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularPositionSensor
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulatedMotorTorqueSensor
]

// Data extracted from transmissions
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of measured motor current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEngineEnabler, FrictionEstimationEnabler
]

instance MotorEncoderPrimaryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of encoder position on motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPrimaryDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionEstimationEnabler
]

instance MotorEncoderSecondaryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of encoder position on gearbox output."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderSecondaryDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionEstimationEnabler
]

instance AngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of output angle of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionEstimationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation-generated time-series data of motor torque."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler, DataComparisonEnabler, FrictionEstimationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured time-series data of motor torque from the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderSecondaryDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataComparisonEnabler, FrictionEstimationEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance MQTTEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating real‑time data streaming between the physical twin and the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionEstimationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkExecutionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment for the friction simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulinkExecutionService
]

instance FrictionEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Aggregates sensor and simulation data for real‑time friction estimation."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionEstimationService, FrictionVisualizationService
]

instance DataComparisonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Compares measured versus simulated data streams for friction model validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelComparisonService
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles data‑driven updates to the robot’s motion controller."
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControllerUpdateService
]

instance AssetShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell linking data to digital twin models."
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetLinkingService
]

instance SysMLVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables visualization of the SysML engineering model of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLVisualizationService
]

// Services
instance RealTimeFrictionEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs real‑time friction estimation and identification using white‑ and black‑box models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionEstimationInsight, MotionControllerUpdateAction
]

instance FrictionModelComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares simulated and measured joint data to validate friction models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelComparisonInsight
]

instance FrictionVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes friction parameters in a unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionVisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionControllerUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Updates the robot’s motion controller with refined friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControllerUpdateAction
]

instance SimulinkExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes custom Simulink block simulations of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox."
]

instance AssetLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Links asset data to digital twin models via Asset Administration Shell."
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetLinkInsight
]

instance SysMLVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides a visual representation of the SysML engineering model."
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLModelInsight
]

// Insights
instance FrictionEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Inference of friction model parameters from live data."
]

instance ModelComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated versus measured data to validate friction models."
]

instance FrictionVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of joint friction parameters in the dashboard."
]

instance AssetLinkInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Linking of asset data to digital twin models via AAS."
]

instance SysMLModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of the SysML engineering model of the first rotary axis."
]

// Actions
instance MotionControllerUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically update the robot’s motion controller with newly inferred friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time; data streaming and processing occur continuously during robot operation with no discrete sampling intervals specified; the DT updates friction models instantaneously as new data arrive."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture where sensor streams feed the digital shadow; a processing component consumes raw data traces, runs the simulation models, generates derived traces; all components are linked via the Asset Administration Shell; the outputs are visualized in a dashboard and stored for further analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers design (ideal kinematic/dynamic model), manufacture (capture of physical parameters), and operation (continuous identification and adaptation of friction parameters during runtime). The DT evolves from its initial design baseline to an operational, continuously updated twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of data points through ‘originates‑from’ associations; models validated against real measurements; continuous identification allows detection of model drift; uncertainty managed via iterative parameter tuning of black‑box models; white‑box models provide insight into physical phenomena but require accurate parameter determination."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical‑to‑virtual: MQTT protocol (e.g., QoS 1), broker on local network; virtual‑to‑physical: not applicable. Data traces include timestamps and payloads defined in JSON or protobuf; Asset Administration Shell uses OPC UA or REST endpoints for model dissemination."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a local or network server (not specified) that runs the dashboard (web‑application) and the processing component. The environment supports MATLAB/Simulink simulation and data handling."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with SysML for modeling, Simulink for simulation, Asset Administration Shell for digital twin definitions (following standard frameworks such as OPC UA); adherence to industrial robot communication standards."
]
